structure_mapping_sample_metadata.review_only_rule: external structure mapping samples are heuristic-control inputs only and cannot create countable labels

warnings: This consistency check uses UniProt feature-sourced active-site positions and AlphaFold/PDB structure mapping only for bounded evaluable rows.
Protein names, EC numbers, Rhea/source labels, and mechanism text are used only for sample stratification and category review, not positive scoring.
